ayahs.arabic: وَٱلطُّورِ
ayahs.translation: By the mount

ayahs.arabic: وَكِتَـٰبٍ مَّسْطُورٍ
ayahs.translation: And [by] a Book inscribed

ayahs.arabic: فِى رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ
ayahs.translation: In parchment spread open

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْمَعْمُورِ
ayahs.translation: And [by] the frequented House

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلسَّقْفِ ٱلْمَرْفُوعِ
ayahs.translation: And [by] the ceiling [i.e., heaven] raised high

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ
ayahs.translation: And [by] the sea set on fire,

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur.

ayahs.arabic: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٍ
ayahs.translation: Of it there is no preventer.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًا
ayahs.translation: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion

ayahs.arabic: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًا
ayahs.translation: And the mountains will pass on, departing -

ayahs.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahs.translation: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
ayahs.translation: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],

ayahs.arabic: هَـٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.translation: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَـٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Then is this magic, or do you not see?

ayahs.arabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."
ayahs.transliteration: Islawha fasbirooaw la tasbiroo sawaon AAalaykum innamatujzawna ma kuntum taAAmaloon

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَعِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,

ayahs.arabic: فَـٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakiheena bima atahumrabbuhum wawaqahum rabbuhum AAathaba aljaheem

ayahs.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."

ayahs.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahs.translation: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
ayahs.transliteration: Muttaki-eena AAala sururin masfoofatinwazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeen

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَـٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَـٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
ayahs.translation: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena amanoo wattabaAAat-humthurriyyatuhum bi-eemanin alhaqnabihim thurriyyatahum wama alatnahum minAAamalihim min shay-in kullu imri-in bima kasaba raheen

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمْدَدْنَـٰهُم بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
ayahs.translation: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.

ayahs.arabic: يَتَنَـٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.
ayahs.transliteration: YatanazaAAoona feeha ka/san lalaghwun feeha wala ta/theem

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
ayahs.translation: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.
ayahs.transliteration: Wayatoofu AAalayhim ghilmanunlahum kaannahum lu/luon maknoon

ayahs.arabic: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo inna kunna qablufee ahlina mushfiqeen

ayahs.arabic: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahs.translation: So Allāh conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."
ayahs.transliteration: Inna kunna min qablu nadAAoohuinnahu huwa albarru arraheem

ayahs.arabic: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
ayahs.translation: So remind, [O Muḥammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.
ayahs.transliteration: Fathakkir fama anta biniAAmatirabbika bikahin wala majnoon

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
ayahs.translation: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time"?
ayahs.transliteration: Am yaqooloona shaAAirun natarabbasubihi rayba almanoon

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
ayahs.translation: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَـٰمُهُم بِهَـٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?
ayahs.transliteration: Am ta/muruhum ahlamuhum bihathaam hum qawmun taghoon

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.

ayahs.arabic: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?
ayahs.transliteration: Am khuliqoo min ghayri shay-in am humu alkhaliqoon

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.
ayahs.transliteration: Am khalaqoo assamawatiwal-arda bal la yooqinoon

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?
ayahs.transliteration: Am AAindahum khaza-inu rabbika amhumu almusaytiroon

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.translation: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority [i.e., proof].
ayahs.transliteration: Am lahum sullamun yastamiAAoona feehifalya/ti mustamiAAuhum bisultanin mubeen

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or has He daughters while you have sons?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
ayahs.transliteration: Am tas-aluhum ajran fahum min maghraminmuthqaloon

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.
ayahs.transliteration: Am yureedoona kaydan fallatheenakafaroo humu almakeedoon

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahs.translation: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.
ayahs.transliteration: Am lahum ilahun ghayru Allahisubhana Allahi AAamma yushrikoon

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
ayahs.translation: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-in yaraw kisfan mina assama-isaqitan yaqooloo sahabun markoom

ayahs.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
ayahs.translation: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -
ayahs.transliteration: Fatharhum hatta yulaqooyawmahumu allathee feehi yusAAaqoon

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma la yughnee AAanhum kayduhumshay-an wala hum yunsaroon

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-inna lillatheena thalamooAAathaban doona thalika walakinna aktharahumla yaAAlamoon

ayahs.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
ayahs.translation: And be patient, [O Muḥammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes [i.e., sight]. And exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord when you arise
ayahs.transliteration: Wasbir lihukmi rabbikafa-innaka bi-aAAyunina wasabbih bihamdirabbika heena taqoom

ayahs.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
ayahs.translation: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.
